intro.p1: A badge is so much more than a piece of fabric. It shows that you have learned something, that you have experienced something special or that you belong to a certain patrol or scout troop.
intro.p2: Decorating your scout shirt with badges is a fun way to always remember your adventures and see everything you have learned along the way. A shirt story about everything you have been part of!

specificaMarken.heading: Sea scout badges
specificaMarken.info: The proof and qualification badges become a sign of what the scouts can do and contribute to safety.

sparare.title: Pathfinder Scouts
sparare.subtitle: For pathfinder scouts there are four participation badges, one proof badge and many interest badges to choose from.

upptackare.title: Explorer Scouts
upptackare.subtitle: For explorer scouts there are six participation badges, four proof badges and many interest badges.

aventyrare.title: Adventure Scouts
aventyrare.subtitle: The adventurers have eight adventures each with their own badge. Proof and interest badges are of course also available!

utmanare.title: Challenge Scouts
utmanare.subtitle: As a challenge scout you create your own projects. The project you have done can be celebrated with one of the badges.

uniform.heading: Every badge has its place
uniform.subtitle1: The badge for your scout troop goes at the top of your left arm. Participation, qualification, proof and interest badges are placed on the left sleeve.
uniform.subtitle2: Your patrol badge is sewn onto the right breast pocket together with the age group badge.
uniform.subtitle3: The Sweden, Europe and world organisation badges go at the top of your right arm. On the right arm you also place your camp and event badges.
uniform.downloadText: Instructions for placement of the new badges on the scout shirt.

scoutmarkenPage.heading: Scout Badges
scoutmarkenPage.downloadText: Instructions for placement of the new badges on the scout shirt.
